package rulefixtures

// scenario for inconsistent_package_name: Directories that mix base Go package names after ignoring the _test suffix.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: style; severity: info.
type Rule751PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario751Positive(records []Rule751PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
